channel.title: Clayton Cunningham Design — Process Notes
channel.description: Process write-ups on illustration systems, iconography, and product design from Clayton Cunningham.

item.title: How to Build a Scalable Illustration System
item.description: Lessons from building Autotrader's illustration system: core element libraries, a defensible style point of view, spot distillation, and the governance that keeps a system coherent as it grows.

item.title: Icon Grids and Optical Corrections
item.description: How to reverse-engineer an icon grid, when to trust keyshapes over pixels, and why optical balance beats mathematical alignment — from the Autotrader and Kelley Blue Book icon systems.
